task: Create a single index.html file with a heading, a short paragraph, and a contact link. Use semantic HTML and basic accessibility (lang attribute, alt text if images).

accessibility.comment: WCAG AA basics: lang attr, semantic header/main, heading hierarchy, navigable link. Added aria-label on nav element — better than baseline but still not full WCAG AA (no skip-nav, no focus styles).

performance.comment: Zero external resources, no JS, no CSS — sub-second render. Minimal DOM, nothing to optimize.

architecture.comment: Clean semantic hierarchy with header/main. Nav with aria-label nested in main. Single file appropriate for task scope.
